chapter_title.en: Chapter 9 – Regarding the invalidation of sighting

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/339)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/339)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اللَّهِ هَلْ يُوصَفُ فَقَالَ أَ مَا تَقْرَأُ الْقُرْآنَ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ أَ مَا تَقْرَأُ قَوْلَهُ تَعَالَى لا تُدْرِكُهُ الْأَبْصارُ وَ هُوَ يُدْرِكُ الْأَبْصارَ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ فَتَعْرِفُونَ الْأَبْصَارَ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ مَا هِيَ قُلْتُ أَبْصَارُ الْعُيُونِ فَقَالَ إِنَّ أَوْهَامَ الْقُلُوبِ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أَبْصَارِ الْعُيُونِ فَهُوَ لَا تُدْرِكُهُ الْأَوْهَامُ وَ هُوَ يُدْرِكُ الْأَوْهَامَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Abu Hashim Al Ja’fary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about Allahazwj, can Heazwj be described?’ So heasws said: ‘Did you not read the Words of the Exalted [6:103] Visions cannot comprehend Him, and He Comprehends (all) visions?’ I said, ‘Yes’. Heasws said: ‘So are you recognising the ‘visions’?’ I said, ‘Yes’. Heasws said: ‘What are these?’ I said, ‘Visions of the eyes’. So heasws said: ‘The imaginations of the hearts are greater than the visions of the eyes. So Heazwj is such that the imaginations cannot comprehend Himazwj and Heazwj Comprehends the imaginations (of the creatures)’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Abu Hashim al-Ja‘fari who has said the following. “I asked Imam abul Hassan al-Rida (a.s.), about Allah if He can be described (defined in words). The Imam (a.s.) said, “Have you not read the Quran?” I replied, “Yes, I do read the Quran.” He then said, “Have you not read the words of Allah, the Most High, “No mortal eyes can see Him, but He can see all eyes. He is All-kind and All-aware.” [6:103] I replied, “Yes, I have read them.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “Do they know the meaning of the eyes?” I replied, “Yes, they do.” The Imam (a.s.) said, “What is it?” I replied, “ It means seeing with the eyes.” Then the Imam said, the Awham (mentioned above) of the heart is far greater comprehensive in knowledge than eye-witnessing. It is not able to comprehend Him but He comprehends all things.”
